landing.featuresSubtitle: One platform for the operating layer of your legal business
landing.contactSubtitle: Use the configured contact channels below for commercial or implementation follow-up.

defaults.tagline: Legal work, client intake, and firm operations in one controlled workspace.
defaults.heroTitle: Run your legal practice with clarity, speed, and stronger follow-through.
defaults.heroSubtitle: Qadaya helps legal teams manage cases, courts, customers, billing, signatures, and administration from a single operating system.
defaults.aboutTitle: Built for legal teams that need one source of truth
defaults.aboutDescription: From the first customer conversation to the final court update, Qadaya keeps tasks, documents, notifications, and decisions visible across the whole firm.

aboutPage.title: About a legal operating system built for disciplined firms
aboutPage.subtitle: We built Qadaya to give legal offices one controlled workspace for case execution, client follow-up, billing, and administration.
aboutPage.description: Qadaya is designed around the real operating pressure inside law firms: fragmented updates, delayed follow-up, hidden workload, and inconsistent visibility across teams. Our goal is to replace scattered tools with one structured platform that keeps legal work clear, accountable, and easier to manage.
aboutPage.missionDescription: Help legal teams run stronger operations with fewer gaps, better coordination, and clear ownership across every case and client interaction.
aboutPage.visionDescription: Become the central operational layer for modern legal offices that want scalable process control without losing professional rigor.

contactPage.title: Contact our team
contactPage.subtitle: Reach out for commercial questions, onboarding coordination, product guidance, or platform support.
contactPage.description: Use the contact details below and our team will route your request to the right owner as quickly as possible.
contactPage.workingHours: Sunday to Thursday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM

automation.title: Structured legal operations
automation.description: Track cases, hearings, documents, and financial workflows without scattered spreadsheets.

collaboration.title: Firm and client coordination
collaboration.description: Keep teams and customers aligned with assignments, timelines, and status visibility.

insight.title: Super admin control
insight.description: Manage tenants, permissions, settings, and platform-wide structure from one control layer.

partners.title: Our partners
partners.subtitle: Law firms already operating with our platform

demo.title: Book a demo
demo.subtitle: Request a guided demo for your office and our team will review and approve it.

contactPage.ctaSubtitle: You can create a tenant directly or move to the about page to understand how the platform is positioned for legal teams.
